# Claude Code Statusline Kit

> A two-line, cross-platform statusline for Claude Code (Anthropic's CLI coding agent). It
> shows the current model, context-window fill, the 5-hour and 7-day rate-limit windows, the
> working directory, git branch, session cost, and elapsed time. Two self-installing
> implementations — bash (macOS/Linux) and PowerShell (Windows) — each read Claude Code's
> statusLine JSON on stdin and print the same color-coded layout.

## Install

- macOS/Linux: download `statusline-command.sh`, then run `bash statusline-command.sh --install` (requires `jq`).
- Windows: download `statusline.ps1`, then run `./statusline.ps1 -Install`.
- The installer copies the script into `~/.claude/` and merges a `statusLine` entry into `~/.claude/settings.json`, backing that file up first and preserving other settings.

## Source

- [statusline-command.sh (bash)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dberardi2020/claude-statusline-kit/main/statusline-command.sh)
- [statusline.ps1 (PowerShell)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dberardi2020/claude-statusline-kit/main/statusline.ps1)
